steps.title: Recognize what 'unimpressed' requires
steps.content: The word unimpressed means the quotation must show the woman expressing a negative judgment or dissatisfaction about the house.

steps.title: Identify the quotation with clear criticism
steps.content: Choice A directly states “disappointment” and asserts the house has “little claim to beauty,” unambiguously showing critical judgment. Choices B, C, and D provide only factual or action-based details without any expression of the woman's negative assessment. That matches choice A — A is correct.
